functions.name: ocPing
functions.replacement_plan: Inline in the UXP panel bridge; no CEP fallback required.
functions.role: Synchronous health probe for the CEP host bridge.
functions.uxp_path: Return a direct health response from the UXP host module.

functions.name: ocGetSequenceInfo
functions.replacement_plan: Keep the UXP bridge implementation as the canonical path.
functions.role: Read the active sequence identity, dimensions, frame rate, and duration.
functions.uxp_path: PProBridge.getSequenceInfo() via Sequence settings and active project state.

functions.name: ocAddSequenceMarkers
functions.replacement_plan: Port callers to the UXP bridge and retain CEP only for legacy hosts.
functions.role: Create timeline markers from backend-generated marker payloads.

functions.name: ocGetSequenceMarkers
functions.replacement_plan: Use the same shape as CEP so backend marker contracts stay stable.
functions.role: Read active-sequence markers for round-trip metadata workflows.

functions.name: ocApplySequenceCuts
functions.replacement_plan: Use documented UXP removal APIs first; cover advanced trim edge cases in F267 UDT before retaining any CEP fallback.
functions.role: Remove or trim timeline ranges and ripple-delete where requested.

functions.name: ocApplyClipKeyframes
functions.replacement_plan: Port as a UXP bridge operation once feature-level UDT covers keyframes.
functions.role: Apply opacity, scale, position, or other keyframe payloads to clips.
functions.uxp_path: Component and property keyframe APIs on UXP clip items.

functions.name: ocBatchRenameProjectItems
functions.replacement_plan: Treat as low-priority convenience wiring in the UXP bridge.
functions.role: Rename selected project items in bulk.

functions.name: ocCreateSmartBins
functions.replacement_plan: Move bin creation behind the UXP project bridge.
functions.role: Create bins for organized project-item workflows.
functions.uxp_path: Project root item and bin creation APIs.

functions.name: ocAddNativeCaptionTrack
functions.replacement_plan: Keep CEP fallback while available; prioritize F253 Hybrid Plugin caption-track creation or adopt an Adobe UXP API if it ships.
functions.role: Create a native Premiere caption track from SRT-style segments.
functions.uxp_path: No UXP createCaptionTrack/addCaptionTrack write API in the pinned beta typings.

functions.name: ocGetProjectBins
functions.replacement_plan: Use UXP project-tree traversal and keep response shape stable.
functions.role: List project bins for import and organization workflows.

functions.name: ocExportSequenceRange
functions.replacement_plan: Route to UXP export APIs as part of F255 encoder integration.

functions.name: ocRemoveSequenceMarkers
functions.replacement_plan: Use UXP marker deletion for parity with marker import/export routes.

functions.name: ocUnrenameItems
functions.replacement_plan: Share the batch-rename UXP bridge path.

functions.name: ocRemoveImportedSequence
functions.replacement_plan: Use UXP project-item deletion with explicit result reporting.
functions.role: Remove a sequence imported for preview or interchange workflows.

functions.name: ocSetSequencePlayhead
functions.replacement_plan: Expose as a UXP bridge utility for review and marker navigation.
functions.role: Move the active sequence playhead to a target time.

functions.name: ocRemoveImportedItem
functions.role: Remove an imported project item by identity.

functions.name: ocQeReflect
functions.replacement_plan: Retire QE reflection after CEP EOL; replace real workflows one by one with documented UXP APIs and F267 UDT evidence.
functions.role: Reflect undocumented QE DOM methods for diagnostics.
functions.uxp_path: No supported UXP QE DOM equivalent.

functions.name: ocEmitPingEvent
functions.replacement_plan: Replace the event transport while keeping the acknowledgement semantics.
functions.role: Emit a panel acknowledgement event for host/panel round trips.
functions.uxp_path: UXP addon events or direct backend callback instead of CSXSEvent.
